name: Acquia Digital Experience Platform API
what_it_does: Drupal-based Digital Experience Platform with REST and JSON:API — enabling enterprises to manage content on open-source Drupal CMS with Acquia's managed cloud hosting, personalization engine (Acquia Personalization), customer data platform (Acquia CDP), and headless delivery via JSON:API and GraphQL, with the security and scale of Drupal's enterprise ecosystem.
use_cases: Delivering headless content via Acquia/Drupal JSON:API for Next.js or Gatsby frontends
Managing Drupal content types, nodes, and taxonomies via API for content migration automation
Integrating Acquia with Salesforce and other CRMs via API for customer data synchronization
Triggering personalization decisions via Acquia Personalization API for targeted content delivery
Managing Drupal site environments and deployments via Acquia Cloud API for DevOps automation
not_for: Organizations without PHP/Drupal expertise (Drupal has significant learning curve)
Small teams needing rapid CMS deployment (Acquia/Drupal requires implementation specialist)
Non-technical editors without CMS training (Drupal requires editorial training investment)
best_when: A government agency, university, or large enterprise needs a GDPR-compliant, open-source-based DXP with full data ownership, strong security posture, and Drupal's extensive module ecosystem — especially where vendor lock-in is a concern.
avoid_when: You don't have PHP/Drupal expertise, need a modern developer experience without Drupal complexity, or are a small/mid-market company where Drupal overhead isn't justified.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for Acquia Cloud API (DevOps/hosting management). API key for Drupal JSON:API and REST (per content type permissions). Bearer token auth. Role-based access via Drupal user permissions system. Webhook for Drupal content events. Acquia Cloud API for hosting and environment management. Drupal JSON:API (core module) for headless content delivery. GraphQL via Drupal GraphQL module (contrib). SAML SSO via Drupal SimpleSAML module.

pricing.paid_tiers: Acquia Cloud Platform from $25,000+/year; Acquia DXP Platform (full suite) from $100,000+/year; contact sales
pricing.notes: Boston company. Founded 2007 by Dries Buytaert (Drupal creator) and Jay Batson. Acquired by Vista Equity Partners (2019) for $1B+. 4,000+ customers globally. Acquia is the largest managed Drupal hosting provider. Drupal is the world's largest open-source CMS by enterprise adoption (37% of Fortune 500 governments/universities). Customers include Warner Bros., Grammy Awards, NAACP, NASA, Oxford University. Strong in government, higher education, healthcare, media. Acquia CDP, Personalization, Campaign Studio (email) as composable DXP modules.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits per environment; CDN-delivered at edge

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Drupal JSON:API (standard, not proprietary) + Acquia Cloud REST API. OAuth2 + API key auth. Good Drupal documentation (massive community). Webhook for content events. FedRAMP authorized for US government use. PHP/Drupal developer expertise required. Acquia Cloud API (hosting) is separate from Drupal content API. Vista Equity ownership with enterprise security standards.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Content reads fully idempotent. JSON:API entity reads idempotent by UUID. Cloud API reads idempotent. Content mutations use UUID for idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: Drupal developer expertise required — significant learning curve for non-Drupal teams
Two separate APIs: Drupal JSON:API (content) and Acquia Cloud API (hosting/DevOps)
FedRAMP authorization required for US federal government use — contact Acquia federal team
Drupal JSON:API uses JSON:API spec (not REST) — different from standard REST patterns
Vista Equity acquisition (2019) — private equity ownership may affect product investment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP, HIPAA compliant. Multi-region data residency including US Gov cloud. OAuth2 with scopes. Vista Equity-backed with enterprise security standards. FedRAMP High authorized for US government CUI. Open-source Drupal allows security audit of CMS code. Drupal security team provides rapid patching for vulnerabilities. HIPAA BAA for healthcare. Government/university use cases require highest security standards — Acquia's enterprise focus delivers.
